name: evidence aggregator promotes a pattern when supporting PRs total at least three with at least two distinct organizations and at least one tier-1 source
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p4","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":2},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":2}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern pat.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'decision=promote' out.txt && grep -q 'evidence_count=3' out.txt && grep -q 'organizations_count=3' out.txt && grep -q 'tier1_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
